sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_data (value Float64, time Int32);
UPDATE test_data SET value = value * 1.1 WHERE time = 2;
SELECT time, exponentialTimeDecayedMax(5)(value, time) OVER (ROWS BETWEEN UNBOUNDED PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) AS exp_smooth FROM test_data;
SELECT time, round(exponentialTimeDecayedMax(3)(value, time), 2) AS smooth_max FROM test_data WHERE value > 15;
